name: Pecan-Crusted Grouper
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly coat fish fillets all over with mustard.
2. Dust with flour, shaking off excess.
3. Dip in egg whites.
4. Roll in chopped pecans.
5. Place fish on a baking sheet sprayed with vegetable oil.
6. Bake at 425 degrees for 15 - 20 minutes, until cooked through.
Columbus Ledger-Enquirer.
